meta.title: Failure to modify scrapie in mice by administration of interferon or anti-interferon globulin -- Gresser et al. 64 (6): 1387 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Administration of potent mouse interferon preparations or anti-mouse interferon globulin did not influence the evolution of scrapie in mice after intraperitoneal injection of the agent. We conclude that the interferon system is probably not involved in scrapie.
